overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Bloodborne showing a Hunter character ascending stone stairs toward an ornate iron gate in a dark gothic cathedral interior. The character passes through the mechanically opening gate and steps onto a glowing circular waypoint lamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic stone staircase with ornate iron gate

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone stairs toward the large closed iron gate

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with worn steps leading upward
tall black iron gate with decorative spikes and vertical bars
carved stone balustrades lining both sides of the staircase
flaming torches mounted on the stone walls providing warm orange light
pointed stone arch framing the iron gate

segments.scene_description: The Hunter character ascends a wide stone staircase in a dark gothic interior. Ornate iron gates stand closed at the top of the stairs, flanked by flaming wall sconces that cast flickering orange light against the cool stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic archway with mechanical iron gate

events.description: large iron gate mechanically opens upward allowing passage through the archway
character steps onto glowing circular waypoint lamp on the floor

agents.ego_description: passing through the opening gate and stepping onto the illuminated circular platform

entered.detail: circular stone platform emitting bright yellow-green light from carved runes
massive stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
shadowy passage extending deeper into the structure

segments.scene_description: The iron gate opens upward revealing a chamber beyond. The character walks through the archway and steps onto a glowing circular lamp set into the stone floor. Massive pillars flank a dark corridor ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark ritual chamber with glowing waypoint

agents.ego_description: standing still on the glowing waypoint lamp facing the dark corridor ahead

segments.scene_description: The character remains stationary on the glowing waypoint, surrounded by darkness. The light from the platform illuminates the immediate area while massive stone pillars fade into shadow along the corridor ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a Hunter ascends from a dark gothic staircase toward a glowing sanctuary within a cathedral. It begins with the character climbing wide stone steps under the flickering orange glow of flaming wall sconces, moving toward a set of closed ornate iron gates. As the gates mechanically slide upward, the camera follows the character through the archway and onto a glowing circular lamp embedded in the stone floor. The scene then shifts from the movement of the ascent to a stationary position on the waypoint, where the platform's light illuminates the immediate surroundings. Finally, the surrounding environment recedes into deep shadow, leaving the character centered in the light while massive stone pillars fade into the darkness of the corridor ahead.
